summary: Added a single opening time anchor to connect the blackout scene more directly to Lena's return from the trailer in chapter 13. The opening construction was already distinct from the visible adjacent chapter opening, and the chapter's ending already handed off cleanly into chapter 15's morning-after evidence pass, so no exit-side rewrite was needed.
edits: Added an opening sentence placing the outage less than two hours after Lena's return from the trailer.
